COUNTY_CD 

LABEL: County Code for Beneficiary (SSA Code) 

DESCRIPTION: This code specifies the Social Security Administration (SSA) code for the county of identified through 
the beneficiary mailing address of the beneficiary. 

LONG NAME: COUNTY_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 

VALUES: —
